pricing_source_note: Official public OpenAI documentation observed on 2026-07-02 lists gpt-5.4-mini standard text pricing at $0.75/input MTok and $4.50/output MTok, but account availability was not verified in this environment, so the execution cost estimate is not final.
stability_run_interpretation: three additional Condition C stability runs beyond the primary run for each selected case
stop_on_cost_rule: Stop before any run that would cause total billed study execution to exceed USD 25.00; verify model availability and live pricing immediately before execution.
